[Sat 2026-04-11 20:55 GMT-5] [Subagent Context] You are running as a subagent (depth 1/1). Results auto-announce to your requester; do not busy-poll for status.

[Subagent Task]: Create a Fiverr gig for Rebecca Ashford UGC Creator.

IMPORTANT: Work with human-like delays (2-4s between actions). Fiverr is sensitive to bot detection.

ACCOUNT: Already logged in via Brave CDP (http://127.0.0.1:18800)
The user has completed the seller profile onboarding. The account is now in seller mode.

GIG DETAILS:
- Title: "I will be your professional UGC female model for your brand"
- Category: Video & Animation > Video Testimonials
- Subcategory: Online Video Testimonials

PRICING:
- Basic: $30 (1 video testimonial up to 30 seconds, 1 revision, 7 days delivery)
- Standard: $70 (1 video testimonial up to 60 seconds, 2 revisions, 5 days delivery, commercial rights) ⭐ RECOMMENDED
- Premium: $120 (2 video testimonials, commercial rights, 3 revisions, 3 days delivery)

DESCRIPTION:
"Hi! I'm Rebecca 👋

I'm a UGC Creator and Fashion Influencer helping brands connect authentically with their audience through engaging video content.

✅ What you get with this gig:
• Authentic, relatable UGC-style video
• Professional quality filming and editing
• Script consultation included
• Multiple video ratios on request (9:16, 1:1, 16:9)
• Fast, clear communication

🎯 Perfect for:
• Brands wanting to showcase products naturally
• TikTok & Instagram Reels
• Product launches
• Testimonials and reviews
• Lifestyle and fashion content

📦 How it works:
1. You share your brief and any key points
2. I create a script/talking points (or use yours)
3. I film and deliver within your package timeframe
4. You request revisions if needed

Let's create something amazing together! ✨"

TAGS: UGC, female model, brand video, testimonial, lifestyle, fashion, TikTok, Instagram Reels, spokesperson, product video

REQUIREMENTS TO ASK BUYERS:
1. Tell me about your brand and product (text - required)
2. What key message or feeling should the video convey? (text - required)
3. Do you have a script or talking points? (yes/no - optional)
4. Preferred video format/ratio? (9:16 / 1:1 / 16:9 - optional)
5. Any brand guidelines? (file upload - optional)

INSTRUCTIONS:
1. Connect via CDP to Brave: import { chromium } from '/home/travis/Lookitry/openclaw/node_modules/playwright/index.mjs'; chromium.connectOverCDP('http://127.0.0.1:18800')
2. Navigate to gig creation page (try: https://www.fiverr.com/gigs/create or look for "Create a Gig" button in seller dashboard)
3. Fill in all the gig details
4. If you hit CAPTCHA, wait 30s and retry
5. Take screenshots at each step
6. Report progress

Do NOT give up if blocked - try different URLs and approaches. The seller account should be active now.

          if (mode === "system") {

          var resolved =
